session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report the results. Do NOT fix any errors — just report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target to check tests and linting

session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with **exit code 2**. Here's what happened:
## Summary
**Overall Status: FAILED**
**Failed step:** Prettier (code formatting check)
**Passing steps:** - Ruff linting: All checks passed - CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md standards: Passed - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5939 passed - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Tests (erk-mcp): 24 passed
## Failure Details
**Prettier Check:** ``` Code style issues found in 3 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. ```
The following files have formatting violations: 1. `.claude/skills/fake-driven-testing/references/quick-reference.md` 2. `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 3. `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
These are markdown files that need to be reformatted with Prettier to pass the code style check.
